name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Set format to '...'
2. Set quality to '...'
3. Set scale_percent to '...'
4. Connect to '...'
5. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Please include the full error message from the ComfyUI console if applicable.

## Performance report output

If relevant, paste the content of the `report` output wire here:

```
(paste report here)
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- ComfyUI version / commit: [e.g. v0.3.10 or git hash]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- Node version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- GPU: [e.g. RTX 3090]

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or workflow exports that might help.
